chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. D-776 of 2014 _____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For order on Misc. No.28858/17 2. For order on Misc. No.24665/17 3. For order on Nazir Report dated 29-10-2015 4. For order on office objection No.4. 5. For hearing of main case. 30.11.2017 Petitioner Muhammad Alam present in person. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, A.A.G. DSP Legal Raza Mian. ________________ Petitioner present in person. This petition was filed on 15-3- 2014. It is stated therein that he appeared in the Entry Test for the appointment as a Constable in Elliot Force in 1992. Comments were called from the respondents. In the para-wise comments dated 15-5- 2015 the S.S.P. Central has stated that the relevant record was scrutinized of the year 1993. Petitioner as per the comments of SSP Central was never issued any appointment letter or letter for medical test as claimed by the petitioner in the memo of petition. At the direction of this Court dated 11-8-2015 matter was referred to the Nazir of this Court to go through the file and examine the documents filed by the petitioner and para-wise comments filed by the respondents. We have gone through the documents available on record and have come to the conclusion that the petitioner has failed to make out a case and the present petition is also not maintainable as there is an un-explained delay of about 22 years in filing the petition. Petition is dismissed alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE
